features.name: literal constant size cast expression
features.description: Code should include a cast expression with a literal constant size specification, where the cast target is a positive integral literal value wrapping an expression

features.name: parameter-based cast expression
features.description: Code should include a cast expression where the target size is specified by a parameter identifier

features.name: expression-based constant size cast
features.description: Code should include a cast expression where the target size is specified by a constant expression in parentheses
